items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.1 mph at a 25.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Cincinnati Reds, KC 9, CIN 2. Lane Thomas led the night, 3-5 | HR, 2B, 4 RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.1 mph.
items.title: Royals at Reds Recap
